mapper.sql: hd.id hd_id, hd.elder_id, e.name elder_name, e.birthday elder_birthday, e.gender elder_gender, e.health_status elder_health_status, e.emergency_contact elder_emergency_contact, e.relation elder_relation, e.contact_number elder_contact_number, hd.record_time, hd.blood_pressure, hd.blood_glucose, hd.heart_rate, hd.spo2, hd.temperature, hd.weight

trim.if: and (e.name like concat('%', #{elderName}, '%') or cast(e.id as char) = #{elderName})

mapper.select: select count(1) from t_health_data hd left join t_elder e on hd.elder_id = e.id

select
from t_health_data hd left join t_elder e on hd.elder_id = e.id where hd.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into t_health_data (elder_id, record_time, blood_pressure, blood_glucose, heart_rate, spo2, temperature, weight) values (#{elderId}, #{recordTime}, #{bloodPressure}, #{bloodGlucose}, #{heartRate}, #{spo2}, #{temperature}, #{weight})
mapper.update: update t_health_data set elder_id = #{elderId}, record_time = #{recordTime}, blood_pressure = #{bloodPressure}, blood_glucose = #{bloodGlucose}, heart_rate = #{heartRate}, spo2 = #{spo2}, temperature = #{temperature}, weight = #{weight} where id = #{id}
